name: zoominfo
description: Connect AI agents to ZoomInfo's verified GTM context graph: 100M companies, 300M professional contacts, buyer intent signals, and real-time scoops. Build prospect lists, enrich records, deep research key organizations, find decision-makers, and prioritize accounts by intent. The B2B sales intelligence layer for Codex and any MCP-compatible agent.

interface.shortDescription: B2B sales intelligence for AI agents: prospect, enrich, and act on buyer intent across 100M companies and 300M contacts.
interface.longDescription: ZoomInfo MCP gives AI agents direct, verified access to the GTM data and context layer trusted by enterprise sales and marketing teams. Use it to build targeted prospect lists, enrich companies and contacts with firmographics and technographics, surface buyer intent and buying signals, identify decision-makers and buying committees, and prioritize accounts by ICP fit and real-time activity. Every tool returns structured data ready to chain into the next step, grounded in the same canonical entities (100M companies, 300M professional profiles, 4,500+ tracked technologies) that power ZoomInfo's enterprise platform. Use cases: B2B lead generation, account-based selling, sales prospecting, CRM data enrichment (including Salesforce data enrichment), buyer intent data for sales, sales pipeline acceleration, territory planning, buying committee research, competitive intelligence, account research before outreach, and de-anonymizing website visitors.
defaultPrompt: Help me prepare for a meeting with Apple's VP of Marketing this afternoon.
Build me a list of SaaS companies in the UK with 200-500 employees using Salesforce.
Find companies showing high buyer intent on data observability in the last 30 days.
